title: Senior Software Engineer - Nucleus Software - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Nucleus Software - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Nucleus Software. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Surat-based team.

About Nucleus Software:
Nucleus Software is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nucleus Software!
